codeReview.summary: The fix correctly addresses the blocking issue from electron-setup. The missing `app:getDataPath` IPC handler has been added to main.ts at line 195. The handler uses `ipcMain.handle()` which properly pairs with the `ipcRenderer.invoke('app:getDataPath')` call in preload.ts line 24. The implementation returns `app.getPath('userData')` which is the correct Electron API for obtaining the user data directory path. No new issues were introduced by this fix.

summary: Fix passes review. The `app:getDataPath` IPC handler was successfully added to src/main/main.ts. The handler correctly returns `app.getPath('userData')` and is properly placed within the `setupIpcHandlers()` function. The preload call `ipcRenderer.invoke('app:getDataPath')` at src/preload/preload.ts:24 will now be handled correctly. No new issues introduced.
